column2: First persona profile authored in AMS canon at canon/personas/ams-canon-code-auditor
column3: First persona profile authored in AMS canon at canon/personas/ams-canon-code-auditor.md as PR #79 to klappy/agent-messaging-service. Schema strictly per klappy://canon/methods/persona-shaped-agent-runtime §The Persona Profile. Locked fields: persona=ams-canon-code-auditor; version=1; system_prompt_uri=ams://canon/constraints/canon-code-sync-via-spawned-agent-session; role=validator per 7-value enum in runtime-contract §Role; mcp_servers.operational=[oddkit]; mcp_servers.task_relevant=[]; knowledge_bases=[klappy://, ams://]; surface_profiles.audit with structured_output required; brand_discipline=null. Three alternatives considered and rejected, retraction conditions named. Status proposed, stability draft, tier 2, 1754 words.

column2: Output_schema URI anchors MUST target real section headings; sub-bullets are addressed at parent section
column3: Output_schema URI anchors MUST target real section headings; sub-bullets without their own heading are addressed at the parent section with prose disambiguation. The handoff specified ams://canon/constraints/canon-code-sync-via-spawned-agent-session#output-contract but verification against the constraint source found no such heading; "Output contract." is a bullet inside ## How the Audit Runs. Resolved by anchoring at #how-the-audit-runs and disambiguating in persona prose. Applies to any future canon doc that references mid-section content via URI anchor.

column2: Gauntlet runs cleanly pre-PR when it is the standing checklist, not a post-mortem retrofit
column3: Gauntlet runs cleanly pre-PR when it is the standing checklist, not a post-mortem retrofit. Move D (PR #77, audit-gate migration plan) skipped challenge/encode/validate entirely; operator caught post-merge; PR #78 was retroactive. Phase 1 (this session) ran oddkit_time first, oddkit_preflight before drafting, oddkit_challenge mode=canon-tier-2 pre-PR (block_until_addressed false, but the two flagged gaps were substantively addressed with new sections). Cost: one tool round-trip and ~290 words. Value: doc landed stronger and discipline trail is durable not retroactive.

column2: Hand-authored TSV instead of calling oddkit_encode for the journal entry; operator caught
column3: Hand-authored TSV instead of calling oddkit_encode for the journal entry; operator caught with "Wtf?! Why aren't you using oddkit for encode?" The rationalization was that oddkit_encode produces Dolcheo+ artifacts (a "separate concept" from journal TSV) — that rationalization was false and pattern-matched on the prior AMS TSV's non-canonical 8-column header-row shape. The canonical serialization format per klappy://odd/encoding-types/serialization-format is no-header, variable-fields-per-type, first-field type letter. The existing AMS journal/*.tsv files (including the one I cribbed from, 2026-05-12-audit-gate-migration-plan.tsv) are themselves non-canonical drift. Mitigation: when an oddkit action exists for a step in the discipline, the canonical-tool path is the default; alternative serialization formats require explicit governance, not inheritance of pre-existing drift.

column2: The canon-code-sync audit gate auto-fired on PR #79 reviewing the persona that describes it
column3: The canon-code-sync audit gate auto-fired on PR #79 and is reviewing the persona profile that describes the gate's own session shape. Four checks ran in_progress on the open: Dispatch Managed Agent for canon-code sync audit, Cursor Bugbot, Workers Builds for tincan and agent-messaging-service. Self-reference is structurally clean — the persona is downstream of the AMS constraint that already governs the gate; coherence drift between them is the audit's job to check. Pending verdict is informative either way.

column2: Phase 1 PR #79 open at klappy/agent-messaging-service; Phase 2 (audit-gate DO) is the next move
column3: Phase 1 PR #79 open at klappy/agent-messaging-service. Hold for operator merge per standing review-before-merge discipline. Phase 2 ready on operator signal: implement worker/src/runtime/audit-gate.ts as Cloudflare Durable Object cribbing from worker/src/mcp.ts; wrangler.toml DO binding + migration; local-only test endpoint; gauntlet pre-PR including oddkit_encode this time. ~2-3 hours of agent-runtime cadence. Phase 1 canon must land before Phase 2 impl is meaningful to test.
